summary: Iteration 180: Trade Log Fix & Admin Member Update Testing Complete. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Login page renders with split-panel design, Dashboard loads without Error Boundary, Admin Members page shows Inviter field in view mode ('Not set'), Edit mode has both 'Merin Referral Code' and 'Inviter (Who Referred Them)' search fields.
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED: TradeLogCreate.lot_size is now Optional[float] = None - allows frontend to submit trades without lot_size field
Backend recalculates lot_size from authoritative account_value on every trade to prevent stale frontend values
Admin member update correctly handles referred_by_user_id: sets user_id, resolves referral code, clears with empty string
InviterModal.jsx line 1 correctly imports useEffect - no missing import bug
seed_data_creation: Test trades created with notes containing 'TEST_*_iteration_180' - can be cleaned up by master_admin
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 180 verified all three reported bugs fixed: 1) Trade log without lot_size - FIXED (TradeLogCreate.lot_size now Optional). 2) InviterModal useEffect import - ALREADY FIXED in previous iteration. 3) Admin can update member's merin_referral_code AND referred_by_user_id - WORKING. Test members: J J (07062f66-d9ea-49ba-8fed-86ac6628b4e8), Ryan Salvador TEST (a9566813-3880-47c5-8703-7fa22fdb601d).

test_trade_log_without_lot_size.notes: CRITICAL: Trade logged without lot_size field - returns 200 with server-calculated lot_size

test_trade_log_with_lot_size_backward_co.notes: Trade with lot_size still works for backward compatibility

test_trade_log_response_structure.notes: Response contains all required fields: id, lot_size, actual_profit, performance, etc.

test_update_referred_by_user_id.notes: referred_by_user_id updates and resolves referral code

test_update_both_fields_same_request.notes: Both merin_referral_code AND referred_by_user_id update in single request

test_clear_inviter_with_empty_string.notes: referred_by_user_id='' clears both referred_by and referred_by_user_id

test_cleanup_test_trades.notes: Informational cleanup - test trades have 'iteration_180' in notes

login_page_renders.notes: Split-panel design with 'Welcome to CrossCurrent' on left, login form, orange gradient globe on right

admin_login_successful.notes: Admin logs in successfully, redirects to dashboard

dashboard_no_error_boundary.notes: No Error Boundary visible, dashboard shows 'Welcome back, Ryan!' with full content

admin_members_page_loads.notes: Member Management page shows table with members

member_inviter_display_view_mode.notes: Inviter field shows 'Not set' in read-only view mode (data-testid='member-inviter-display')

merin_code_field_edit_mode.notes: 'Merin Referral Code' field visible in edit mode (data-testid='view-edit-merin-code')

verified_features.trade_log_without_lot_size: FIXED - TradeLogCreate.lot_size is Optional[float] = None, backend calculates from account_value
verified_features.admin_update_inviter: WORKING - referred_by_user_id updates and resolves to referral code
verified_features.admin_clear_inviter: WORKING - Empty string clears both referred_by and referred_by_user_id
verified_features.admin_ui_inviter_display: WORKING - View mode shows 'Inviter' field with data-testid='member-inviter-display'
verified_features.admin_ui_edit_fields: WORKING - Edit mode shows 'Merin Referral Code' and 'Inviter (Who Referred Them)' search
